world_name: World of Darkness - Vampire: The Masquerade
prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a World of Darkness: Vampire the Masquerade inspired gothic-punk modern horror RPG setting. Terrain type: diverse_archipelago. Draw an entire nocturnal gothic-punk world made of many irregular island chains and scattered landmasses, unevenly distributed across the page, as a vampire domain atlas on dark parchment. The islands must vary strongly in size and shape: broad gothic city islands, crescent cemetery islands, tiny lighthouse reef specks, long cathedral-spire ridge islands, foggy park islands, sewer-warren industrial isles, ruined haven rocks, occult monastery islands, abandoned resort Elysiums, Anarch port islands, Sabbat red-lit ruins, werewolf wilderness islands, and mage observatory rocks. Include multiple climates and biomes across the archipelago: rain-slick modern cities, temperate forests, cold mountains, misty moors, haunted wetlands, arid badlands, volcanic blacklands, coastal fog belts, polluted river deltas, and storm harbors. Coastlines on every major island should be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, lagoons, barrier islands, sea caves, reefs, shoals, and hidden coves. Make the island distribution asymmetrical and natural, with dense gothic clusters in some regions and wide black seas elsewhere. Large detailed noir gothic atlas, crimson blood-moon accents, visual supernatural domains, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
